name: Transcure
description: Expert medical billing with 1100+ specialist billers for 40+ specialties, 98% first-pass clean claims rate, RPA automation for claim submission and AR recovery within 24 days.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Truly, the easiest transition I could ever imagine. And their services are fantastic!
We are incredibly impressed with Transcure Medical Billing Services' medical billing expertise
Invaluable partner in managing our billing needs with expertise, accuracy, and dedication
While there's still a little room for improvement in reporting details

sentiment.summary: Transcure Medical Billing Services is highly regarded for seamless transitions, knowledgeable support, and improved cash flow, with one reviewer noting minor room for improvement in reporting.
